2605.10796.title: Interpretable Machine Learning for Football Performance Analysis: Evidence of Limited Transferability from Elite Leagues to University Competition
2605.10796.paper_summary: Machine learning has become increasingly prevalent in football performance analysis, yet most studies prioritize predictive accuracy while implicitly assuming that learned performance determinants and their interpretations are transferable across competition levels. Whether interpretability remains reliable under domain shift-from elite to university football remains largely unexplored. This study investigates whether performance determinants learned from elite competitions are structurally transferable to university-level football and whether their interpretations remain robust under domain shift. Models were trained on large-scale event data from the top five European leagues and applied to university football data from National Tsing Hua University (NTHU) using an identical feature space. Random Forest and Multilayer Perceptron models were interpreted using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) and Counterfactual Impact Score (CIS). Across five experiments, elite football exhibited a stable and consistent hierarchy of performance determinants across leagues, models, and explanation methods. In contrast, NTHU university football showed substantial reordering of key indicators, reduced explanation stability, weaker structural agreement with elite domains, and increased sensitivity to explanation method. These findings suggest that interpretability robustness is domain-dependent. Rather than reflecting methodological limitations alone, instability in explanations under domain shift may serve as a diagnostic signal of structural ambiguity in the target domain.
2605.10796.paper_summary_zh: 機器學習在足球表現分析中變得越來越普遍，然而大多數研究優先考慮預測準確性，同時隱含假設所學得的表現決定因素及其解釋在不同競賽層級之間是可轉移的。從精英足球到大學足球的領域轉變下，解釋性是否仍然可靠在很大程度上尚未被探索。本研究探討了從精英競賽中學到的表現決定因素是否在結構上可轉移到大學層級的足球，以及它們的解釋在領域轉變下是否仍然穩健。模型在來自五大歐洲聯賽的大規模事件數據上進行訓練，並使用相同的特徵空間應用於國立清華大學（NTHU）的足球數據。隨機森林和多層感知器模型使用SHapley Additive exPlanations（SHAP）和反事實影響分數（CIS）進行了解釋。在五個實驗中，精英足球在聯賽、模型和解釋方法之間展現出穩定且一致的表現決定因素層級。相對而言，NTHU的大學足球顯示出關鍵指標的顯著重新排序、解釋穩定性的下降、與精英領域的結構一致性較弱，以及對解釋方法的敏感性增加。這些發現表明，解釋性的穩健性是依賴於領域的。領域轉變下解釋的不穩定性可能不僅反映方法論的局限性，還可能作為目標領域結構模糊的診斷信號。
2605.10796.author: Yu-Fang Tsai et.al.
2605.10796.authors: Yu-Fang Tsai, Yu-Jen Chen, Kok-Hua Tan, Sheng-Chieh Huang, You-Ying Ji, Yu-Lun Chen, Chun-Yi Wang, Chien-Ming Hsu
